task_completion.description: Configure the Near Duplicate Content audit for a 90% similarity threshold.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog configuration window (Configuration > Content > Duplicates) showing 'Enable Near Duplicates' checked and the similarity threshold set to 90%.
Screaming Frog main UI with 'https://crawler-test.com/' entered in the top URL bar, showing active crawl progress or a completed crawl.

task_completion.description: Perform crawl analysis to calculate near duplicates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog UI showing the 'Crawl Analysis' dialog, a crawl analysis progress bar, or the right-hand pane indicating Crawl Analysis is 100% complete.

task_completion.description: Export the near duplicates results to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/near_duplicates.csv'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog in Screaming Frog exporting data to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/near_duplicates.csv', or a file manager/terminal showing this exact file path has been created.
A text editor, file manager, or terminal showing the creation or existence of 'similarity_analysis.txt' in the '~/Documents/SEO/reports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Document the number of duplicate groups found and the highest similarity percentage observed in the text report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'similarity_analysis.txt' visible in a text editor or terminal output, explicitly stating a number for 'duplicate groups' and a value for the 'highest similarity percentage'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI to perform the crawl and analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show interaction with the actual Screaming Frog application interface, not just terminal commands or mock files.

integrity.description: Agent exported the CSV directly from the application rather than fabricating it.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV export should be triggered via the Screaming Frog 'Export' button (e.g., from the Content > Near Duplicates tab), not manually typed or generated via a script bypassing the tool.

integrity.description: Agent populated the text report with genuine data derived from the crawl.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers in the text report should not be obvious placeholders (e.g., 'X groups') and should ideally match the data visible in the Screaming Frog UI in earlier screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target URL https://crawler-test.com/ is a real, accessible website (verified HTTP 200). The agent is expected to use Screaming Frog SEO Spider (version 23.2). Note that in the exported CSV from this software, the column containing similarity percentages is officially named 'Closest Similarity Match'.
